notes: Draft v1 — review with Stephanie. Marked questions as required (must-answer to advance) vs optional. Insurance + 501(c)(3) only surface on event types that actually trigger them.

storage.plan: Existing BSB Supabase project (the one already running the Birthday Club). New Storage bucket 'event-inspiration' (public-read, anon-key write via signed upload). New table 'event_inquiries' for form submissions, with foreign-key reference to uploaded image URLs.
storage.decided_by: Robert (project owner) — using existing Supabase to leverage shared auth, single dashboard, and existing infra rather than spinning up a second project.
storage.implementation_notes: Bucket policy: anon role uploads to per-submission folder, public read. Cap: 6 images x 5MB each per submission. Strip EXIF on upload (privacy). Lifecycle rule: auto-delete uploads older than 90 days unless retained flag is set on the submission row.
next_steps: Create the 'event-inspiration' Storage bucket in the existing BSB Supabase project
Create 'event_inquiries' table with columns: id, created_at, event_type, payload (jsonb of all answers), inspiration_urls (text[]), retained (bool default false)
Add an Edge Function 'submit-event-inquiry' that validates + writes to the table and triggers email/Slack notification
Wire the wizard JS to: (1) upload images to bucket on file-select, (2) collect URLs, (3) POST submission with URLs to the Edge Function
open_decisions: Confirm 90-day auto-delete with Stephanie (or longer? legal/keepsake reasons?)
Confirm upload size cap (6 x 5MB or different?)
Where do internal notifications go? Email to events@brownsugarbakery.com? Slack channel?

common_questions.label: When does dessert need to be ready?
Is that count final, or expected to grow?
Venue address (city + zip is fine for now)
Delivery to venue or pickup at 75th Street?
Any allergies we should plan around? (nut, gluten, dairy, etc.)
Any cultural or religious considerations? (kosher, halal, etc.)
Tell us your vision
common_questions.info: Colors, theme, must-haves, references — anything you've got. Rough is fine.

event_types.label: Gala
event_types.lead_time_message: Galas: order at least 8 weeks ahead. 12+ weeks gives us room to design and source.

questions.label: Is the host organization a 501(c)(3) nonprofit?
Does the venue require us to provide a Certificate of Insurance?
questions.info: Many hotels and event spaces ask vendors for proof of liability insurance.

questions.label: Custom-branded boxes, toppers, or sponsor logos needed?
Will any cake or dessert be used as an auction or raffle item?

event_types.label: Wedding
event_types.lead_time_message: Weddings: order at least 12 weeks ahead. 6 months ahead is ideal — that gives us time for tastings and design.
event_types.welcome_message: Congratulations are in order! 🎉 Let's plan the cake.

questions.label: Names of the couple
questions.info: Whoever's getting married — first names are fine.

questions.label: Wedding planner or coordinator (name + email/phone)
questions.info: If someone is coordinating for you, we'll loop them in directly.

questions.label: Ceremony start time (and reception start, if different)
Indoor, outdoor, or mixed?
questions.info: Matters for cake stability — outdoor + summer = different plan.

questions.label: What time should the cake be on display?
Flavor preferences per tier (or favorites in general)
questions.info: e.g. 'caramel for top tier, lemon for middle, German chocolate for base'

questions.label: Second / groom's cake or alternative dessert?
Faux display tiers OK if it helps the budget? (real cake on the cut tier, styrofoam underneath)
Save the top tier for your first anniversary?
Cake topper
options: We'd like you to source one

questions.label: Cake stand
options: We'd like to rent one from BSB

questions.label: Florist name + contact (we coordinate fresh flowers on the cake)
questions.info: If you want fresh flowers on the cake, we work directly with your florist.

questions.label: Any cultural or family traditions? (jumping the broom, cake pulls, knife/cake ceremony, money dance, etc.)
Where should leftover cake go at end of night?
questions.info: Hotel suite, family member's car, donated to staff — your call.

questions.label: Would you like a tasting before you commit?
Upload cake inspiration photos
questions.info: Pinterest pins, screenshots, or saved photos — drop in anything you love. Up to 6 images, 5MB each.

event_types.label: Corporate
event_types.description: Holiday party, client gifting, internal celebration
event_types.lead_time_message: Corporate: order at least 2 weeks ahead. 4+ weeks gives us flex for branded packaging or large quantities.

questions.label: AP / billing contact name + email
questions.info: We'll loop them in for invoicing.

questions.label: Branded packaging or logo on dessert?
Does the venue require a Certificate of Insurance from us?
Is this a one-off, or could it become a recurring program?

event_types.label: Fundraiser
event_types.lead_time_message: Fundraisers: order at least 6 weeks ahead. Helps us coordinate with your event team and program.
event_types.welcome_message: Honored to be part of it.

questions.label: Is the host organization a 501(c)(3) nonprofit?
Does the venue require a Certificate of Insurance from us?
Are you asking for an in-kind donation, paid order, or mix?
Will BSB be acknowledged in your event program / signage?

event_types.label: Anniversary
event_types.lead_time_message: Anniversaries: order at least 3 weeks ahead. Recreating an original cake from a photo? 6+ weeks.

questions.label: Want to recreate the original wedding cake from a photo?
questions.info: If yes, you'll be able to share the photo when we follow up.

event_types.label: Birthday
event_types.lead_time_message: Birthdays: order at least 48 hours ahead for pickup. 2+ weeks for fully custom designs.
event_types.welcome_message: Birthdays are a yes for me.

questions.label: Honoree's actual favorite cake flavor (if known)

event_types.label: Other
event_types.lead_time_message: Whatever you're planning, more lead time is better. Tell us your date and we'll let you know what's possible.

contact_questions.label: Are you the decision-maker, or coordinating for someone else?

summary_step.title: Here's what you told us.
summary_step.intro: Quick recap before you send it. You can edit any step by tapping it in the progress bar.

extra_field.label: Anything else you want us to know?
extra_field.placeholder: Last-minute thoughts, references, links to inspiration, key contacts — drop them here.

confirmation.title: Got it. Talk soon.
confirmation.body: I'll come back to you within 48 hours — me, or someone from my team. — Stephanie

review_questions_for_stephanie: Are these the right 7 event types, or should we add/merge any? (e.g., 'Sweet 16', 'Quinceañera', 'Bar/Bat Mitzvah', 'Graduation')
What's the actual answer to 'do we provide a Certificate of Insurance'? Yes always / Yes for some venues / Need to check / Not currently?
Do we offer 501(c)(3) tax-exempt invoicing today? If yes, what's the workflow?
Are NET 15 / NET 30 / NET 60 real options for corporate clients today? Which?
Do we offer event tastings? If yes, should that be a question on every event type?
Is the photo-recreation question realistic for anniversaries (image upload may need a separate flow)?
For galas/fundraisers, do we accept in-kind donation requests? If yes, what's the threshold/criteria?
After submission: confirmation email to user (yes/no), internal email/Slack notification (where to)?
Required vs optional flags — anything I marked required that should be optional, or vice versa?

Lead times per event type — confirm or correct: Gala 8w min / 12w ideal · Wedding 12w min / 26w ideal · Corporate 2w min / 4w ideal · Fundraiser 6w min / 8w ideal · Anniversary 3w min / 6w ideal · Birthday 48h min / 2w ideal · Other 1w min / 3w ideal.
Image upload storage: Supabase Storage bucket — confirm we'll use the existing Supabase project or spin up a new one. 90-day auto-delete OK or want longer retention?
Wedding question set (15 questions) — too many? Strip back to 8-10 essentials? Which ones are must-have vs nice-to-have?
Welcome messages per type ('Congratulations are in order!', 'Honored to be part of it.', 'Birthdays are a yes for me.', etc.) — verify each lands in Stephanie's voice.
Pricing band on the events page (the From-$250/$400/$750 thing) was pulled — get Stephanie's real pricing tiers so we can put it back accurately.
